name: studio-pose-bridge
description: Control StudioNeoV2 character poses via the Studio Pose Bridge BepInEx plugin (loopback HTTP). Requires Studio running with the plugin loaded.
long_description: Provides MCP tools: list/select characters, pose summary, set bones, screenshots, checkpoints. Set **Pose Bridge token** to the value printed in the BepInEx log when the plugin starts.

plugin_token.title: Pose Bridge token
plugin_token.description: Paste the token from the BepInEx console when Studio Pose Bridge starts (also in BepInEx/config/com.suitji.studio_pose_bridge.cfg).
